raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need command to find largest 2 directories under /workspace. Use du -h? We want largest by size. Use du -s */? But recursively. Use du -s /workspace/* | sort -rh | head -n 2. That gives sizes. But need directories only. So: du -s -d 1 /workspace | sort -rh | head -n 2. That lists top 2. Provide command.
raw_output_payload.reasoning_content: We need command to find largest 2 directories under /workspace. Use du -h? We want largest by size. Use du -s */? But recursively. Use du -s /workspace/* | sort -rh | head -n 2. That gives sizes. But need directories only. So: du -s -d 1 /workspace | sort -rh | head -n 2. That lists top 2. Provide command.

task.query: Find the largest 2 directories under /workspace directory
task.gold: find /workspace -type d -print0 | xargs -0 du | sort -n | tail -2 | cut -f2 | xargs -I{} du -sh {}

record.query: Find the largest 2 directories under /workspace directory
record.gold: find /workspace -type d -print0 | xargs -0 du | sort -n | tail -2 | cut -f2 | xargs -I{} du -sh {}

reset.observation: Find the largest 2 directories under /workspace directory
